fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  mut depth = 0
  mut ok = true
  mut i = 0
  while i < line.len()
    let b = match line.get(i)
    when Some(c)
      c

    else if b == 41
      if depth == 0
        ok = false

  if ok and depth == 0

  end
